ach.title: Our Achievements
ach.subtitle: Milestones that shaped our story and the recognition that reflects our commitment to quality and innovation.

snapshot.title: A legacy of development, built for today
snapshot.subtitle: A modern extension of the Bin Saedan family legacy since 1934—focused on high-quality residential and commercial destinations, investment solutions, and long-term property care across Saudi Arabia.

residential.title: Residential Communities
residential.desc: Malfa and Nozol developments—villas, modern complexes, and semi-gated neighborhoods designed for everyday living.

commercial.title: Commercial Destinations
commercial.desc: Plazas and office assets in strategic locations, built to support thriving business districts.

investment.title: Investment Solutions
investment.desc: Professionally managed real estate funds that offer structured opportunities for individuals and institutions.

management.title: Property Management
management.desc: Long-term maintenance, leasing, and customer support to protect asset value beyond delivery.

legacy.title: Heritage & Land Bank
legacy.desc: Decades of trust and a strategic portfolio that supports sustainable urban growth.

quality.title: Modern Delivery
quality.desc: Using advanced practices like BIM to improve efficiency, reduce waste, and elevate design quality.

vision.title: Vision 2030 Alignment
vision.desc: Contributing to homeownership growth and workforce development through nationally aligned initiatives.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn about our board members and our strategic vision and mission.
about.companyIntroBody: It is a real estate development company that was established to be an active partner in the real estate scene of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia by implementing exceptional residential and commercial real estate innovations. Since its inception, the company has worked to ensure that its projects are characterized by quality and sustainability to create spaces that meet the desires and goals of individuals and communities.
about.animatedPanelBody: Our strategy combines design quality, investment discipline, and sustainable urban value.

home.title: Faisal Bin Saedan
home.subtitle: Explore our distinguished collection of residential projects in the best locations in the Kingdom
home.heroDescription: We design and deliver developments that shape cities, support national progress, and create long-lasting value.
home.legacyTitle: A Legacy of Trust and Quality
home.legacyDescription: Building integrated communities for over three decades
home.qualityDescription: We adhere to the highest standards of quality in construction and finishing
home.locationDescription: We choose the best locations to ensure successful future investment
home.serviceDescription: We provide integrated services to our clients even after delivery
home.ctaDescription: Register your interest now and our team will contact you to help you choose the right unit
home.cmaDescription: Faisal bin Saedan Investment and Real Estate Development Company operates in accordance with approved regulatory frameworks and in coordination with the Saudi Capital Market Authority to develop and manage investment opportunities. This includes structuring and launching real estate funds in line with the highest standards of governance and compliance, thereby enhancing transparency and safeguarding investors’ interests.
home.cmaCollaborationTeaser: Additional collaboration initiatives with the Saudi Capital Market Authority are coming soon.
home.inspiringSpacesDesc: Through structure, discipline, and strategic foresight, we transform potential into enduring, measurable value, supporting national progress and sustainable growth.
home.statsDesc: At Faisal Bin Saedan, we strive to implement modern architectural styles and inspiring innovations with a strong foundation.

residential.title: Residential
residential.description: Faisal bin Saedan residential projects provide inspiring havens with sustainable environmental designs that meet all your basic and luxury needs, from internal protection and living services to stunning views, as they are designed to suit your distinctive lifestyle.

commercial.title: Commercial
commercial.description: Our carefully selected commercial buildings inspire you to pursue your entrepreneurial dreams, as we provide the ideal starting point for whatever your business growth may be, from retail and entertainment venues to modern office space.

collaboration.title: Collaboration — coming soon
collaboration.description: We are preparing additional programs in coordination with the Saudi Capital Market Authority. This page will be updated with more information in due course.
